xml_refactor_workflow.mode_overview: This mode converts XML column definitions (coldgrtieuchuan tags) from legacy HRM grid specifications into Vue 3 Grid config blocks. It follows a strict 7-step process to produce 4 code blocks per grid: cols_all, cols_display, cols_labels, and cols_types.

input_requirements.requirement: XML block containing coldgrtieuchuan tags with attributes: tblColName, title, hide, width, positionCol
Grid index (Grid_0, Grid_1, etc.) identifying which 4 blocks to update
Optional: line ranges for the 4 code blocks if user provides them

step.title: Parse XML Column Definitions
step.description: Read each coldgrtieuchuan tag and extract: 1. tblColName → convert to UPPERCASE (e.g., NV_Ngayvao → NV_NGAYVAO) 2. title → preserve exactly as-is (Vietnamese labels) 3. hide → determine true/false (case-insensitive: "TRUE", "True", "true" all mean hidden) 4. positionCol → sort all columns by this value ascending
step.validation: Confirm total column count matches the number of coldgrtieuchuan tags in the XML.

step.title: Classify Data Types
step.description: Assign a data type to each column based on the type classification rules defined in 2_type_classification.xml. Use both the column name (UPPERCASE) and the title text to determine the correct type.
step.validation: Every column must have exactly one type assigned. Count totals per type for the final checklist.

step.title: Generate Grid_X_cols_all
step.description: Create a JavaScript const array containing ALL column names (UPPERCASE), including hidden columns. Preserve STT and TT at the beginning if they exist in the original code.

rules.rule: Include ALL columns from XML, sorted by positionCol
Preserve STT/TT from original code if present
Use 2-space indentation, trailing comma on each line

step.title: Generate Grid_X_cols_display
step.description: Create a JavaScript const array containing only columns where hide="false" (case-insensitive). Exclude columns where hide="true".

rules.rule: Preserve STT/TT from original code if present and visible
Same UPPERCASE and formatting rules as cols_all

step.title: Generate Grid_X_cols_labels
step.description: Create a JavaScript const object mapping each column name (UPPERCASE) to its title from the XML. Include ALL columns (both visible and hidden).

rules.rule: Values are the exact title text from XML (Vietnamese)
Preserve STT/TT labels from original code if present

step.title: Generate Grid_X_cols_types
step.description: Create a JavaScript const object mapping each column name (UPPERCASE) to its classified data type from Step 2.

rules.rule: Types must match the classification from Step 2
Preserve STT/TT types from original code if present

step.title: Apply to Vue Component
step.description: Replace the 4 target code blocks in the Vue component file using precise diff operations. Only modify the specified Grid_X blocks.

rules.rule: Do NOT modify other Grid blocks (Grid_1 when editing Grid_0, etc.)
Do NOT modify code logic outside the 4 specified blocks
Ensure all column names are UPPERCASE in the output
Use targeted diff replacements, not full file rewrites

completion_checklist.description: After completing all 7 steps, report to the user:
completion_checklist.item: Total number of columns in cols_all
Number of hidden columns (hide=true) — list their names
Number of visible columns in cols_display
Type breakdown: count of text, number, date, action columns
Columns that were converted to UPPERCASE (if original had mixed case)

scenario.name: missing_xml
scenario.condition: User does not provide XML block
scenario.action: Ask user to paste the XML containing coldgrtieuchuan tags

scenario.name: missing_target
scenario.condition: User does not specify which Grid_X to update
scenario.action: Read the Vue file and identify available Grid config blocks, then ask user to confirm which one

scenario.name: ambiguous_type
scenario.condition: Column name and title do not clearly match any type rule
scenario.action: Default to "text" and note it in the checklist for user review

scenario.name: existing_stt_tt
scenario.condition: Original code has STT/TT columns not in the XML
scenario.action: Preserve them at the beginning of all 4 blocks
